parsed_questions.question_text: Met-enkephalin, an endorphin, serves as a natural pain reliever that changes or removes the perception of nerve signals. Label all of the functional groups present in Met-enkephalin.
parsed_questions.context: A chemical structure with labeled functional groups: amine, phenol, amide, arene, carboxylic acid, and sulfide.
Two chemical structures are present: 1. An alkane with multiple methyl and isopropyl groups labeled 2. A cycloheptane with a bromine and tert-butyl group labeled.
